name: Hydro Spot 1
comment: The ADJ Lighting Hydro Spot 1 is a feature-packed, LED-powered moving head spot luminaire housed within a robust IP65-rated housing. Featuring a potent 200-Watt cool white LED engine, it delivers punchy output which can be manipulated using an extensive collection of beam-shaping tools. These include motorized zoom (for a beam angle of 12° ~ 23°), motorized focus, two frost filters (light and heavy), two rotating prisms (5-facet linear & 6-facet circular), 6 rotating and replaceable GOBOs, and two color wheels (each with 8 options).

capabilities.comment: Clockwise Color Wheel Rotation fast to slow
Counter-Clockwise Color Wheel Rotation slow to fast
Clockwise Color Wheel Rotation fast to slow
Counter-Clockwise Color Wheel Rotation slow to fast
Clockwise Gobo Wheel Rotation fast to slow
Counter-Clockwise Gobo Wheel Rotation slow to fast
Clockwise Gobo Rotation fast to slow
Counter Clockwise Gobo Rotation slow to fast
Clockwise Prism Rotation fast to slow
Counter-Clockwise Prism Rotation slow to fast
